sample_job_descriptions.title: Senior AI Backend Engineer
sample_job_descriptions.raw_text: We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to build scalable AI microservices. The ideal candidate has strong experience with Python 3, building RESTful APIs using FastAPI, and designing PostgreSQL database schemas. You should have at least 4 years of software engineering experience. Familiarity with NLP, Machine Learning, and vector databases like FAISS is highly desired. Containerization using Docker and orchestration with Kubernetes will be considered a strong plus. You must hold a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field.

sample_resumes_to_create_as_pdfs.raw_text:
ALICE SMITH
alice.smith@email.com | (555) 123-4567

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, MIT - 2018

EXPERIENCE
Senior Software Engineer (2019 - Present)
- Developed robust backend architectures using Python and FastAPI.
- Designed complex SQL queries for PostgreSQL databases.
- Deployed containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes.
- Implemented semantic search features using FAISS and machine learning embeddings.

SKILLS
Python, FastAPI, Django, SQL, Docker, Kubernetes, Machine Learning, FAISS, Git
